title: Easy Totem of undying Crafting
description: This mod adds a crafting recipe for the Totem of Undying, which is normally only obtainable from raids. Now, you can craft it in survival without needing to start a raid!
body:
This mod adds a crafting recipe for the Totem of Undying, which is normally only obtainable from raids. Now, you can craft it in survival without needing to start a raid!

🛠️ Totem of Undying Crafting Recipe:

1 × Golden Apple

1 × Emerald

3 × Glistering Melon Slice

4 × Gold Ingot

The recipe is intentionally expensive to keep the balance – after all, the Totem is a powerful item.

🧪 Perfect for modded survival, server play, or anyone who wants a fair way to obtain the Totem without relying on raids.

![Totem of undying crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9787ae7c620a143345cbc2661978e8c87a1c71b1.png)


Avaible on:
- Forge: 1.20.1
- NeoForge: 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.8

### ATTENTION
You can definitely add this mod to your modpack.
